header: One site, fifteen themes: the feature that ended our rebuild era
dek: Desiderio lets any page subtree run its own shadcn preset, inherited down the rootline and switched at runtime. Here is how we give every chapter of a site a distinct, launch-ready look — without a single rebuild or deploy.

cover_image.title: Desiderio frontend on the Lagoon preset
cover_image.alternative: Desiderio demo site hero page rendered in the light Lagoon theme preset.
cover_image.description: Frontend screenshot of a TYPO3 site built with Desiderio.
